label: Riftshade Sleepcell
description: Riftshade Sleepcell is a narrow sleeping alcove partitioned from Riftshade Hearthroom by soot-dark composite panels set into the slagcrete shell of the hab-tier. A low, lock-fixed cot platform and built-in storage niches occupy the length of one wall, their edges sealed with ash-gaskets to preserve the bastion’s controlled air. Armored view-slits admit a restrained bruise-colored auroral sheen that catches on stenciled devotional strips and the matte grit of stormborne residue. Overhead, shielded conduit spines and a compact vox-dampening baffle reinforce the Nocturnis Bastion doctrine of redundant, interference-hardened domestic space.
